title: Turnkey Carpet Cleaning & Restoration Biz – 3k Clients, $12K Monthly
reasonForSelling: At over 60 years old, it’s time for me to take a job that is less tasking to my
supportTraining: I will provide training and support.
description:
Established in 2016, a one man operations, this service business provides professional residential and commercial cleaning and restoration services. The company has built a strong reputation for reliability, quality workmanship, and excellent customer service, consistently maintaining a 5-star customer rating.

The business offers a range of high-demand services including carpet cleaning, water damage restoration, dryer vent cleaning, and tile and grout cleaning. Over the years, the company has developed a unique carpet cleaning system that differentiates it from competitors while maintaining average market pricing, allowing it to attract repeat customers and referrals.

The operation comes fully equipped with a 2018 Ram ProMaster service van (approximately 68,000 miles) and professional-grade equipment for both carpet cleaning and water damage restoration, including dehumidifiers, air movers, and other essential tools. The business also includes a new carpet cleaning truckmount system currently under a five-year lease with approximately two years remaining.

With an established customer base and proven service model, this is a turnkey opportunity for a new owner to step into an operating business with strong growth potential.

Ad#:2480768
